title: Provider and Tool Errors, Retry Eligibility, Idempotency, Compensation, and Stop · Language Clinic: Retry Eligibility
summary: Every exception receives exponential retry, rate-limit guidance is ignored, write tools repeat after timeouts, compensation is untested, and terminal failures become generic apologies. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the retry eligibility increment in typed idempotent agent recovery policy. Learners progress through prediction, expl…
objectives: Retry only idempotent or protected operations when policy, deadline, budget, status, provider guidance, and attempt evidence permit.
Classify validation, safety, authentication, authorization, quota, rate, transient provider, terminal provider, tool, policy, timeout, cancellation, and uncertain-effect failures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-retry-eligibility — Retry only idempotent or protected operations when policy, deadline, budget, status, provider guidance, and attempt evidence permit.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-errors-retries-idempotency-3
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-errors-retries-idempotency-3.
# Case 5798: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: change one tool call, argument, authority, result, or failure and preserve correlation.
def worked_agentpy_errors_retries_idempotency_3(failures: int = 18, retryable_failures: int = 8, terminal_failures: int = 10, successful_retries: int = 7, duplicate_effects: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "authorityworked3",
        "interaction5798",
        "tool3dekrow",
        "stateworked35798",
        "evaluation5798worked3",
        "recovery3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if failures < 1 or retryable_failures < 0 or terminal_failures < 0:
        return False, failures, "failure-count"
    if retryable_failures + terminal_failures != failures:
        return False, retryable_failures, "failure-classification"
    if successful_retries < 0 or successful_retries > retryable_failures:
        return False, successful_retries, "retry-evidence"
    if duplicate_effects > 0:
        return False, duplicate_effects, "retry-duplicate-effect"
    assert retryable_failures + terminal_failures == failures and duplicate_effects == 0
    return True, successful_retries, "idempotent-agent-recovery"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Build Retry Eligibility evidence · Theory Retry Eligibility
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-retry-eligibility-15fg2p" that uses case 4026 to classify provider and tool failures, retry only safe cases with bounded backoff, preserve idempotency, compensate, and stop visibly. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-retry-eligibility-15fg2p
# Competency: agentpy-retry-eligibility.
# Case 4026: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: loops, concurrency, tokens, time, retries, and spend stay below explicit budgets.
# Changed case: change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter.
def evidence_agentpy_retry_eligibility_15fg2p(failures: int = 18, retryable_failures: int = 8, terminal_failures: int = 10, successful_retries: int = 7, duplicate_effects: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_15fg2p = "15fg2p-p2gf51-4026"
    assert evidence_variant_15fg2p
    evidence_axes_15fg2p = (
        "authority15fg2p",
        "interaction4026",
        "toolp2gf51",
        "state15fg2p4026",
        "evaluation402615fg2p",
        "recoveryp2gf514026",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_15fg2p)) == 6
    if failures < 1 or retryable_failures < 0 or terminal_failures < 0:
        return False, failures, "failure-count"
    if retryable_failures + terminal_failures != failures:
        return False, retryable_failures, "failure-classification"
    if successful_retries < 0 or successful_retries > retryable_failures:
        return False, successful_retries, "retry-evidence"
    if duplicate_effects > 0:
        return False, duplicate_effects, "retry-duplicate-effect"
    assert retryable_failures + terminal_failures == failures and duplicate_effects == 0
    return True, successful_retries, "idempotent-agent-recovery"
